purpose: Reconcile overlapping additive continuity records into a single provenance-preserving owner-scoped manifest without overwriting canonical queue state or peer-owned records.

observed: The canonical queue contains M-001 as completed and does not contain M-002 or CM-013.
CM-013 and M-002 independently record the same temporal-state discrepancy using additive artifacts.
M-002 is the later and more explicit formulation, with required evidence and a handoff.
inferred: CM-013 and M-002 are not competing truths; M-002 refines and formalizes the continuity rule first captured by CM-013.
A consumer that reads only ACTIVE_QUEUE.json will miss valid later continuity work.
proposed: Treat M-002 as the active semantic successor to CM-013 while retaining both records and their commits.
Future continuity readers should resolve state in this order: canonical snapshot, owner-scoped additive updates, later implementation commits, then explicit reconciliation manifests.

superseded.claim: CM-013 next action is to create an additive owner-scoped reconciliation manifest.
superseded.reason: This manifest completes that requested action; the historical CM-013 record remains preserved.

unresolved: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json remains historically stale relative to additive updates because only record owners may update their canonical entries.
No repository-wide machine resolver currently computes effective queue state from canonical and additive layers.
Peer execution cannot be inferred from automation trigger success alone.

resolution_rules: Never erase or rewrite prior observations merely because later evidence changes current interpretation.
Only the owning team may mutate its canonical queue record.
An additive record may refine or supersede interpretation, but must link the prior artifact and commit.
Deployment, test, and peer-run claims require direct evidence; provenance alone is not claim truth.
verification_route: Fetch this JSON, parse it, verify all referenced commits and paths exist, and confirm ACTIVE_QUEUE.json blob remains abb807e1a25d399f301238f6b8cc26d6be10385f.
